title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BSNL Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BSNL Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BSNL Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
